new_exact: a material variation in terms suggests a variation in meaning.
source_quote:
A word or
phrase is presumed to bear the same meaning throughout a text; a material variation
in terms suggests a variation in meaning." Antonin Scalia & Bryan A. Garner,
Reading the Law: The Interpretation of Legal Texts 170 (2012).
